title: Public data,
processed and always up-to-date
hero.description: The data subscription with automatic processing and updates. Focus on analysis while we ensure the data is fresh and ready to use. Subscribe and help maintain the largest collection of processed public data in Brazil.
hero.stats: We accelerate the work of over 25,000 researchers, public servants, and companies every month

tab1.label: Access data in BigQuery
tab1.description: Query the data directly in BigQuery using SQL

tab2.label: Access to updated data
tab2.description: Access updated data on the platform within 1 day of the original source's release

tab3.label: Update alerts and notifications
tab3.description: Receive an email as soon as a table is updated at Data Basis

tab4.label: Direct integration with Python and R
tab4.description: Access data directly in your work environment with our Python and R packages

t1.name: Fernando Barbalho
t1.role: Technical Advisor to the Vice President of the Republic
t1.text: I usually use the Data Basis platform to look for municipal data, especially the more stable ones, such as historical population series. I also use it for CNPJ data and other very large datasets that would be difficult to reconstruct in an isolated environment. The ease of using SQL commands helps with cross-referencing and aggregating data.

t2.name: Luiz Fernando Toledo
t2.text: I end up asking more complex questions in my stories because I know the data analysis work won't be as complicated, thanks to these tools you provide.

banner.title: Discover BD Pro
banner.description: Subscribe to BD Pro to access the most updated version of these and other datasets, always in sync with the original source. Besides having constant access to integrated, quality data, your subscription helps Data Basis maintain and expand the largest public and free datalake in Brazil.
banner.button: Learn more and take a free test
